title: Upstream Workflow full compat for grok-pi
objective: Run upstream xai-workflow Rhai engine and shell orchestration on grok-pi by plugging a Pi SpawnAgent backend; reuse Pager workflow UI; no TS reimplementation.

phases.name: act on learning and hand off

decision_points.question: Which route should the next implementation take?

options.label: Direct implementation
options.criteria: Scope is clear, blast radius is small, and validation path is known.

options.label: Research first
options.criteria: Domain facts, dependencies, or ownership are still unclear.

options.label: Split into slices
options.criteria: The work is valid but too broad for one safe change.

decision_points.rationale: Full upstream compat spans shell seam + External runtime + Pi spawn extension + adapter projection; must ship as S1-S5 not one PR. Research already closed engine/host ownership.

decision_points.question: After Check, should this cycle close, pivot, or continue?

options.label: Close cycle
options.criteria: Acceptance evidence is complete and no important risk remains.

options.label: Continue same cycle
options.criteria: Core direction is right but more execution is required.

options.label: Pivot plan
options.criteria: Validation changed the problem or invalidated current assumptions.

decision_points.rationale: Session host wired: ExternalWorkflowRuntime + Pi spawn bridge + workflow_updated projection + launch/pause/stop ACP methods. Unit/check green. Residual is optional live deep-research handtest only.

validation.notes: 74/75 shell workflow tests pass (1 pre-existing macOS /private symlink). Adapter 100 tests pass. grok-pi check ok.

next_action: Optional: handtest deep-research in grok-pi; no blocking work.
notes: Workflow full-compat foundation complete; live handtest optional.
